Name: Data Extraction Using Azure Content Understanding

Labs.Title: Getting Started
Labs.Description: Overview of Azure Content Understanding, solution architecture, pre-deployed resources, and Azure Portal sign-in.

Labs.Title: Lab 01 - Explore Azure Resources and Configure Content Understanding
Labs.Description: Explore pre-deployed Azure resources, navigate Azure AI Foundry and the Content Understanding project, verify the gpt-4o deployment, set up the Python environment, and configure the application.

Labs.Title: Lab 02 - Extract Documents Using Azure Content Understanding
Labs.Description: Review extraction configs, start the Function App, upload field schemas to create Content Understanding analyzers, ingest a lease agreement, and examine extracted data in Cosmos DB.

Labs.Title: Lab 03 - Query Extracted Data with Azure OpenAI
Labs.Description: Query extraction results using natural language, explore multi-turn conversations, examine chat history in Cosmos DB, and understand Semantic Kernel orchestration.

Labs.Title: Lab 04 - Deploy to Azure and Monitor
Labs.Description: Deploy the Function App to Azure, configure and test deployed endpoints, and monitor with Application Insights live metrics.
